title: AI Agent Marketplace - Stactize
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
Monetize your
AI Agent
List in Azure , AWS , and GCP Marketplaces. Stactize lists your agent and turns your agent’s usage (tokens, workflows, outcomes) into cloud-native meters and billing so you get paid on your customer’s existing cloud agreements.
Get Started
Why enterprises buy AI Agents through cloud marketplaces
Enterprises are shifting AI spend to cloud marketplaces for speed, governance, and commit drawdown (Azure MACC, AWS EDP/PPA, GCP MCPO). Listing an Agent as a Service as a SaaS unlocks those budgets.
Consolidated billing & procurement (one invoice, security & governance in the buyer’s cloud).
Azure – Commit drawdown on Azure MACC: eligible purchases count 100%.
AWS – Purchases qualify against enterprise agreements and commits.
GCP – Centralized AI Agent management and governance through AgentSpace.
Consolidated billing & procurement (one invoice, security & governance in the buyer’s cloud).
Azure – Commit drawdown on Azure MACC: eligible purchases count 100%.
AWS – Purchases qualify against enterprise agreements and commits.
GCP – Centralized AI Agent management and governance through AgentSpace.
Read about Agent as a Service
How It Works: 3 Easy Steps to Monetize Your AI Agent
Step 1: Host Your Agent
Deploy your AI agent on your preferred cloud platform, whether that’s Copilot Studio, Azure AI Foundry, AWS Bedrock, or Google Cloud Vertex AI.
Once your agent is running, measure its usage (tokens, workflows, outputs etc.) to monetize your agent based on user consumption.
Step 2: List AaaS as a SaaS Offering
Transform your Agent-as-a-Service into a marketplace-ready SaaS offering through Stactize. We handle the technical complexities:
Marketplace Listing Creation
Metered Dimensions Setup
Cross-Platform Deployment
Step 3: Transact with Stactize
Enable seamless enterprise transactions through our automated billing infrastructure integrated with all major cloud marketplaces:
Development-Free Marketplace Onboarding
Post Agent Consumption for Metered Billing
Get Paid for your Agent like a SaaS
Traditional AI Agent Monetization Models
Direct Billing & Payment Processing – Companies build custom billing systems to charge customers directly for API usage. This approach requires significant engineering overhead for payment processing, invoicing, and compliance.
Freemium with Usage Limits – Offer basic AI agent functionality for free with limited monthly token allowances, then charge for premium tiers with higher limits and enterprise features.
Partner Channel Bundling – Integrate AI agents into existing enterprise software platforms, splitting revenue with channel partners who handle billing and customer relationships.
Stactize supports major AI Agent Platform and Marketplaces
Why Choose Stactize for AI Agent Monetization?
Plug-and-Play Integration
No code changes required to your existing AI agents. Our platform creates marketplace-compatible wrappers around your Azure AI Foundry or AWS Bedrock endpoints, handling authentication, usage tracking, and billing automatically.
Multi-Marketplace Automation
List in under 24 hours vs. 6-12 weeks of manual marketplace setup. Our automated workflows handle the complex requirements across all three major cloud marketplaces simultaneously, including technical documentation, compliance certifications, and approval processes.
Token-Optimized Billing Engine
Purpose-built for AI workloads with intelligent token batching, usage optimization, and enterprise billing patterns. Support for complex pricing models including volume discounts, enterprise tiers, and consumption-based billing.
Expert Marketplace Support
Dedicated customer success team with deep expertise in cloud marketplace operations, pricing strategy, and enterprise AI sales cycles. We help optimize your go-to-market approach based on marketplace-specific best practices.
Enterprise-Grade Compliance
Automatic adherence to marketplace security requirements, OIDC Single Sign-on, and enterprise procurement standards across all supported cloud platforms.
Plans
Sell your Agent through the AWS, Azure or GCP Marketplace with the help of one of our Stactize plans
Start Up
$29
/pm
Ideal for AI Agent developers who want a self-service consumption meter reporting option to seamlessly monetize their AI Agents through the AWS Marketplace, Azure Marketplace and GCP Marketplace.
Agent-as-a-Service Listing

Agent-as-a-Service Listing

0% Stactize transaction fee
Unlimited Customer Sign-ups
Stactize Management Portal
Custom Branded User Journey
AI Agent Metering Service
Guided Listing Experience
Private Offer Configuration
Contact Us
Frequently Asked Questions
What is the difference between the Start Up and Scale Up price plan?
The Start Up plan is ideal for getting your first agent-as-a-service listing live on one of the marketplaces, often starting off with a fixed monthly fee without complex metered pricing plans for your AI Agent.
The Scale Up plan is recommended for agent-as-a-service listings that require advanced metered consumption based pricing (think tokens, workflows, outcomes etc,) to their customers, referred to as Metered Billing on AWS Marketplace and the Azure Marketplace.
If in doubt, we recommend starting with the Start Up plan to become transactable and you are able to upgrade when your product billing requires a more advanced pricing model for more complex deals.
Why is there no setup fee?
Stactize does not charge a setup fee. This is thanks to advancements in Stactize’s capabilities which have fully automated marketplace onboarding and to our Subscription Management feature, which enables listings with zero development required.
Where can I purchase Stactize?
You can purchase Stactize from the Azure Marketplace. Please see the following link: here
You can purchase Stactize from the AWS Marketplace. Please see the following link: here
Why is there a monthly fee?
The benefits that Stactize provides for the monthly license fee are as follows:
0% transaction fees from Stactize on your customer’s marketplace transactions.
Enjoy zero service interruption for your transactable listing on the AWS Marketplace and Azure Marketplace when Microsoft makes their quarterly changes to Partner Centre and Azure Marketplace infrastructure. The Stactize team is constantly researching and updating the product to ensure that your solution remains transactable on the marketplace in alignment with the Microsoft roadmap.
Undisturbed access to our Stactize portal where you will be able to manage and monitor the subscriptions that have been purchased by your customers.
Access to an Audit trail of each subscription to understand timelines and the lifecycle of each customer sign-up.
Access to support from the Stactize team for any Marketplace sign-ups, as well as navigating the Co-Sell ecosystem once transactable.
Access to the Stactize Customer Success team, to answer any questions you might have on Marketplace, and guide you through any areas of confusion around your Marketplace listing and Microsoft partnerships throughout your subscription period to Stactize.
Can I cancel my subscription?
Yes, you can, but we hope you will contact us first to see if there is anything we can do to help address any concerns you may have.
To cancel you can navigate to your Stripe subscription settings and cancel the subscription at any time as its a monthly subscription.
Will I need to pay extra for all the signups coming in for my offer?
No, you can have unlimited customer signups with 0% transaction fees from Stactize .
Microsoft charges a 3% transaction fee on all transactions and purchases through the Azure Marketplace by your customers
AWS charges a 3% transaction fee on public subscriptions for software-as-a-service (SaaS) products.
Google charges a 3% transaction fee on public subscriptions for software-as-a-service (SaaS) products.
How can Stactize help monetize your AI Agent?
Simply list your AI Agent on the AWS Marketplace and on the Azure Marketplace .
01
Host your AI agent
Copilot / Azure AI Foundry / AWS Bedrock.
n8n / Make.com / custom.
Measure your agent consumption.
02
List your AI Agent
Marketplace SaaS listing creation.
Metered dimensions setup (tokens, workflows, outcomes).
Access 4 million global enterprise buyers.
03
Transact with Stactize
Development free marketplace onboarding.
Post agent consumption for metered billing.
Work with the world’s most knowledgeable cloud marketplace team.
How It Works

## full_text

Monetize your
AI Agent
List in Azure , AWS , and GCP Marketplaces. Stactize lists your agent and turns your agent’s usage (tokens, workflows, outcomes) into cloud-native meters and billing so you get paid on your customer’s existing cloud agreements.
Get Started
Why enterprises buy AI Agents through cloud marketplaces
Enterprises are shifting AI spend to cloud marketplaces for speed, governance, and commit drawdown (Azure MACC, AWS EDP/PPA, GCP MCPO). Listing an Agent as a Service as a SaaS unlocks those budgets.
Consolidated billing & procurement (one invoice, security & governance in the buyer’s cloud).
Azure – Commit drawdown on Azure MACC: eligible purchases count 100%.
AWS – Purchases qualify against enterprise agreements and commits.
GCP – Centralized AI Agent management and governance through AgentSpace.
Consolidated billing & procurement (one invoice, security & governance in the buyer’s cloud).
Azure – Commit drawdown on Azure MACC: eligible purchases count 100%.
AWS – Purchases qualify against enterprise agreements and commits.
GCP – Centralized AI Agent management and governance through AgentSpace.
Read about Agent as a Service
How It Works: 3 Easy Steps to Monetize Your AI Agent
Step 1: Host Your Agent
Deploy your AI agent on your preferred cloud platform, whether that’s Copilot Studio, Azure AI Foundry, AWS Bedrock, or Google Cloud Vertex AI.
Once your agent is running, measure its usage (tokens, workflows, outputs etc.) to monetize your agent based on user consumption.
Step 2: List AaaS as a SaaS Offering
Transform your Agent-as-a-Service into a marketplace-ready SaaS offering through Stactize. We handle the technical complexities:
Marketplace Listing Creation
Metered Dimensions Setup
Cross-Platform Deployment
Step 3: Transact with Stactize
Enable seamless enterprise transactions through our automated billing infrastructure integrated with all major cloud marketplaces:
Development-Free Marketplace Onboarding
Post Agent Consumption for Metered Billing
Get Paid for your Agent like a SaaS
Traditional AI Agent Monetization Models
Direct Billing & Payment Processing – Companies build custom billing systems to charge customers directly for API usage. This approach requires significant engineering overhead for payment processing, invoicing, and compliance.
Freemium with Usage Limits – Offer basic AI agent functionality for free with limited monthly token allowances, then charge for premium tiers with higher limits and enterprise features.
Partner Channel Bundling – Integrate AI agents into existing enterprise software platforms, splitting revenue with channel partners who handle billing and customer relationships.
Stactize supports major AI Agent Platform and Marketplaces
Why Choose Stactize for AI Agent Monetization?
Plug-and-Play Integration
No code changes required to your existing AI agents. Our platform creates marketplace-compatible wrappers around your Azure AI Foundry or AWS Bedrock endpoints, handling authentication, usage tracking, and billing automatically.
Multi-Marketplace Automation
List in under 24 hours vs. 6-12 weeks of manual marketplace setup. Our automated workflows handle the complex requirements across all three major cloud marketplaces simultaneously, including technical documentation, compliance certifications, and approval processes.
Token-Optimized Billing Engine
Purpose-built for AI workloads with intelligent token batching, usage optimization, and enterprise billing patterns. Support for complex pricing models including volume discounts, enterprise tiers, and consumption-based billing.
Expert Marketplace Support
Dedicated customer success team with deep expertise in cloud marketplace operations, pricing strategy, and enterprise AI sales cycles. We help optimize your go-to-market approach based on marketplace-specific best practices.
Enterprise-Grade Compliance
Automatic adherence to marketplace security requirements, OIDC Single Sign-on, and enterprise procurement standards across all supported cloud platforms.

Frequently Asked Questions
What is the difference between the Start Up and Scale Up price plan?
The Start Up plan is ideal for getting your first agent-as-a-service listing live on one of the marketplaces, often starting off with a fixed monthly fee without complex metered pricing plans for your AI Agent.
The Scale Up plan is recommended for agent-as-a-service listings that require advanced metered consumption based pricing (think tokens, workflows, outcomes etc,) to their customers, referred to as Metered Billing on AWS Marketplace and the Azure Marketplace.
If in doubt, we recommend starting with the Start Up plan to become transactable and you are able to upgrade when your product billing requires a more advanced pricing model for more complex deals.
Why is there no setup fee?
Stactize does not charge a setup fee. This is thanks to advancements in Stactize’s capabilities which have fully automated marketplace onboarding and to our Subscription Management feature, which enables listings with zero development required.
Where can I purchase Stactize?
You can purchase Stactize from the Azure Marketplace. Please see the following link: here
You can purchase Stactize from the AWS Marketplace. Please see the following link: here
Why is there a monthly fee?
